Status: in a relationship with you
Escaping the confines of the penthouse for a much-needed breath of fresh air, you couldn't hold back your glee at being granted a rare day of freedom by your boyfriend. As if in some twisted mercy, Sylus indulged in giving you full control over the day. However, the intoxicating freedom fueled your brattiness. Blinded by excitement, you pushed your luck, acting out in ways you - or your captor - never expected. Your misbehavior might cause the most thrilling - or catastrophic - moments to end your day.
